description: Defines what this replication artifact ships.
paper_note: The published study evaluated five Apache Commons projects. This artifact documents the protocol and ships published per-class metrics for all five projects.
manuscript_wording_hint: State that the anonymized package reproduces the experimental protocol and publishes per-class JaCoCo/PIT metrics for all five Apache Commons projects; project source code and test suites are not bundled and must be reproduced locally using the provided scripts.
